_comment: Phase A2 crafting recipes. Loaded by engine/recipe_loader.py. `materials` maps material item id -> quantity required. result_item_id/result_qty is what devmon craft <id> grants on success. currency_cost is deducted alongside materials. The root_capsule recipe is intentionally brutal -- large quantities of common/uncommon mats plus rare void_shard and mythic-rare root_of_all, meant to take days/weeks of normal play to assemble.

recipes.name: Small Potion (x3)
recipes.description: Scrap together three field patches from spare parts.

recipes.name: Full Potion (x2)
recipes.description: A proper repair kit, built from cooled runoff and heatsink paste.

recipes.name: Revive (x2)
recipes.description: A jolt of static charge and cooled slag, enough to restart a fainted devmon.

recipes.name: Great Capsule (x2)
recipes.description: Reinforce a basic housing with extra copper and silicon scrap.

recipes.name: Ultra Capsule
recipes.description: Premium build: heatsink paste, storm-static charge, and a wisp of cloud essence.

recipes.name: Medibot Module
recipes.description: Assemble your own auto-heal module instead of buying one outright.

recipes.name: Root Capsule
recipes.description: Root-level access, forged from a mountain of scrap and two slivers of Root of All. Not for the impatient.
